_fixture_note: Real output from 2026-07-16, ~1 hour after the account's first-ever Cost Explorer visit. The DataUnavailableException from the initial run (captured in this skill's SKILL.md verification history) has cleared -- both sections now return cleanly with no errors. total_unblended_cost is genuinely 0: this is a fresh AWS free-tier account ('credits cover your free plan costs', per the Billing console) with no billable resources actually deployed yet, not a bug and not hidden data. This fixture demonstrates a THIRD honest state distinct from the first run: not 'Cost Explorer unavailable' and not 'a real anomaly fired' -- 'the query succeeded and genuinely found nothing,' which is exactly what a clean, low-usage account should report.
region_note: Cost Explorer has no regional scope of its own -- API calls are pinned to us-east-1 regardless of where resources actually run.
scope_note: Costs reflect only what this IAM principal's Cost Explorer access can see -- under AWS Organizations consolidated billing, a linked-account principal may see a narrower scope than the full org.
